description: Mexican criminal syndicate founded in 2010 from remnants of La Familia Michoacana and Beltrán-Leyva Organization, operating primarily in southern Mexico. Known for drug smuggling to Chicago, corruption of police, and the 2014 kidnapping of 43 Ayotzinapa students. The group is still active.

country_links.evidence_quote: the 'specialty' of Guerreros Unidos was smuggling drugs in hidden compartments it fitted in passenger buses traveling to Chicago, Illinois in the United States.
country_links.context: Guerreros Unidos smuggled drugs in hidden compartments on passenger buses traveling to Chicago, Illinois, where a contact would unload and distribute the drugs.
